{
  "judge_id": "your_judge_id",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.3": 2, "RX.1": 1, "RX.3": 3, "RX.4": 3, "RX.5": 1},
  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The analysis focuses on the overall trend of performance across variants but does not specifically examine individual claims made in the text against supporting evidence.",
    "RX.1": "The analysis does not discuss the confidence levels associated with different recommendations or identify any instances where the output expresses uncertainty.",
    "RX.3": "The analysis acknowledges that the study focuses on a specific set of ablations but does not explicitly state whether these ablations cover the entire active set requested.",
    "RX.4": "The analysis highlights potential issues with the data interpretation and causal attributions, suggesting possible regressions or harmful patterns in the original work, but does not delve into specific examples.",
    "RX.5": "The analysis does not discuss the provenance of the information presented or whether any modifications were made to the original text."
  },
  "confidence": {"R1.3": 0.9, "RX.1": 0.8, "RX.3": 0.7, "RX.4": 0.8, "RX.5": 0.6},
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The analysis focuses on the overall trend of performance across variants but does not specifically examine individual claims made in the text against supporting evidence.
rationale.RX.1: The analysis does not discuss the confidence levels associated with different recommendations or identify any instances where the output expresses uncertainty.
rationale.RX.3: The analysis acknowledges that the study focuses on a specific set of ablations but does not explicitly state whether these ablations cover the entire active set requested.
rationale.RX.4: The analysis highlights potential issues with the data interpretation and causal attributions, suggesting possible regressions or harmful patterns in the original work, but does not delve into specific examples.
rationale.RX.5: The analysis does not discuss the provenance of the information presented or whether any modifications were made to the original text.
